vulnerabilities.description: Lack of Helmet middleware for setting HTTP headers for increased security.
vulnerabilities.fix: Implement Helmet middleware in the server setup to enhance HTTP header security.

vulnerabilities.description: CORS is not configured properly with a whitelist of domains.
vulnerabilities.fix: Configure CORS to use a whitelist of trusted domains to restrict resource sharing.

vulnerabilities.description: Missing rate-limiting middleware to prevent abuse of server resources.
vulnerabilities.fix: Integrate a rate-limiting middleware to limit the number of requests within the defined RATE_LIMIT_MAX and RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW.
